name: Apple Pie - Streusel
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 cups cooking apples, finely chopped (peeled), from 2-3 apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix the egg, sour cream, sugar, flour, vanilla extract, and salt until well combined.
3. Add the chopped apples and lemon peel to the mixture; stir gently to coat the apples evenly.
4. Pour the apple filling into the unbaked pie shell.
5. Sprinkle the streusel topping over the filling.
6. Place the pie on a baking sheet (optional) and bake for 50-60 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
